platform: hybrid_fullstack (Expo React Native Mobile + React Web TV Display)
emotional_tone: Calm, approachable, efficient, optimistic, modern futuristic

fonts.heading: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif
fonts.body: Manrope, SF Pro Display, system-ui, sans-serif

buttons.primary: bg-[#B4A6F8] text-white rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 font-bold active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F3F4F6] text-[#1C1C1E] rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 font-semibold active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.glass: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/50 text-[#1C1C1E] rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 font-semibold

inputs.text_field: bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-2xl px-4 py-4 text-base focus:border-[#B4A6F8] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#B4A6F8]/20 transition-all
inputs.search_bar: bg-[#F3F4F6] border-none rounded-full px-5 py-3 text-base

tv_display.now_serving_card: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-[3rem] border border-white/50 shadow-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-16
tv_display.next_item: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-2xl p-6 flex justify-between items-center border border-white/40

transitions.spring: spring config: mass 1, stiffness 170, damping 26 (for framer-motion or react-native-reanimated)

micro_interactions.tv_number_change: scale up 1.1 then back to 1.0, color flash to mint green

pastel_abstract.description: Abstract pink and blue wavy liquid pattern used for welcome screen and TV display background

pastel_gradient.description: Soft pastel gradient used for subtle background overlays or merchant headers

cafe_counter.description: Modern minimal cafe counter. Use as placeholder for Merchant profile/thumbnail.

person_using_app.description: Person using phone at a cafe. Use in onboarding/welcome screens.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native app combined with a web dashboard/TV Display. Use cross-platform compatible styling (e.g. NativeWind) or adapt the Tailwind classes provided to standard StyleSheet/Tailwind logic.

For Mobile App screens (Welcome, Customer Browse, Merchant Dashboard), utilize the 'mobile' spacing and 'glass_panel' surface properties. Use rounded-t-[2.5rem] for bottom sheets which are crucial for this iOS aesthetic.

For the TV Display screen (React Web landscape), use the 'tv_landscape' spacing. The layout must be grid-cols-12, heavily utilizing the 'pastel_abstract' background image as a full-screen underlay with a white/20 glassmorphism overlay to ensure text readability.

Ensure contrast is maintained. Since the primary color is a soft lavender (#B4A6F8), use dark text (#1C1C1E) instead of white text inside the soft colored cards unless the background is sufficiently dark.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use Outfit or system-ui rounded sans-serif. Apply tracking-tight to all headings > 24px.
Google OAuth and Custom JWT buttons must be prominent on the Welcome screen, stacked with the primary button style.
All interactive elements MUST include test attributes (e.g. testID='login-button' for RN, or data-testid='login-button' for web).
